headline: Why Nuro thinks being a robotaxi ‘second mover’ gives it an advantage
summary: Nuro believes being a 'second mover' in robotaxis offers a strategic advantage. It aims to learn from leaders like Waymo instead of racing to be first. This approach allows for adaptation and differentiation in the autonomous vehicle market.

headline: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
summary: Record Club is a new platform designed as Letterboxd or Goodreads for music lovers. It offers a clean interface for cataloging listening habits. The app aims to foster connections among music fans.

headline: The man behind the legendary MPC, Roger Linn, stays focused with a single browser tab
summary: Roger Linn, creator of the legendary MPC and LinnDrum, is a music tech pioneer. He developed the first drum machine to use samples, the LM-1. Linn maintains a focused approach to his work.

headline: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
summary: Discover 38 recommended Memorial Day tech deals, all priced at $50 or less. Find budget-friendly gadgets like portable chargers and 4K streaming devices. These deals offer great value amidst larger sales.

headline: Rocket League Devs Explain How Unreal Engine Powers the Paris Major
summary: Rocket League developers showcased Unreal Engine's power at the Paris Major. Epic Games utilizes Unreal Engine for live stadium technology. This implementation helps eliminate competitive match lag during events.

headline: Ranking the Star Wars Movies From Worst to Best
summary: A comprehensive ranking of all live-action Star Wars movies is presented. The list includes the recent "The Mandalorian and Grogu" film. Movies are ordered from worst to best based on editorial review.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Confirmed to Feature Drunk Load Screen After Ubisoft Post Confuses Fans
summary: Ubisoft confirmed Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced will retain its unique drunk load screen. Fans were initially confused by a prior Ubisoft announcement. Edward Kenway's iconic stumbling animation will still feature.

headline: The Boys Actor Antony Starr Says Goodbye to Homelander With Spoiler-Heavy Behind-the-Scenes Photos
summary: Antony Starr, Homelander from The Boys, posted spoiler-heavy behind-the-scenes photos. He used Instagram to bid farewell to his iconic role. The photos mark the end of his time on the recently concluded series.

headline: Girl raped by boys spared jail tells BBC judge's decision was like 'rock in my face'
summary: A 16-year-old rape survivor spoke to the BBC about her ordeal. She described the judge's decision to spare her attackers jail as a "rock in her face." Her interview questions the justice system's process and impact.

headline: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
summary: A suspect was killed after opening fire on Secret Service agents near the White House. The individual approached a checkpoint before initiating gunfire. A bystander also sustained injuries during the incident.

headline: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
summary: A major Russian attack on Ukraine resulted in four fatalities and dozens injured. Russia confirmed the use of its advanced Oreshnik missile. The Oreshnik missile is known to travel at over 10 times the speed of sound.

headline: Midnight Sun-derland: Zara Larsson electrifies the crowd at Big Weekend
summary: Swedish pop star Zara Larsson captivated the crowd at Big Weekend. She delivered a high-energy performance with back-to-back pop hits. Her set was a highlight on the festival's second day.
